trans-unit.source: Destroy a previously deployed AppHost environment (Preview)
trans-unit.target: Destroy a previously deployed AppHost environment (Preview)

trans-unit.source: The destroy command requires --yes when the --non-interactive option is specified.
trans-unit.target: The destroy command requires --yes when the --non-interactive option is specified.

trans-unit.source: The output path containing the deployment artifacts to destroy
trans-unit.target: The output path containing the deployment artifacts to destroy

trans-unit.source: Do not prompt for confirmation before destroying resources
trans-unit.target: Do not prompt for confirmation before destroying resources
